fields.name: Full Service
fields.description: Comprehensive service including oil and filter change, fluid top-ups, brake check, tyre check, and full vehicle inspection. Uses OEM-grade parts and fluids. Price varies by engine size and vehicle type.

fields.name: Interim Service
fields.description: A shorter service covering essential checks and oil and filter change. Ideal between full services. Uses OEM-grade oil and filters.

fields.name: Oil Change
fields.description: Engine oil and filter replacement using manufacturer-recommended oil grade. Price varies by oil type and engine capacity.

fields.name: Wiper Blade Replacement
fields.description: Replacement of front and/or rear wiper blades with OEM-quality blades. Price per blade.

fields.name: Brake Pads Replacement
fields.description: Brake pad replacement using OEM-quality pads. Price per axle (front or rear). Includes 12-month warranty on parts and labour.

fields.name: Brake Discs and Pads Replacement
fields.description: Full brake disc and pad replacement. Price per axle (front or rear). Uses OEM-spec discs and pads with 12-month warranty on parts and labour.

fields.name: MOT Test
fields.description: Annual MOT test to ensure your vehicle meets road safety and environmental standards. Government-set maximum fee.

fields.name: Pre-MOT Check
fields.description: A thorough inspection covering common MOT failure points before your test. Helps avoid unexpected failures and saves on retest fees.

fields.name: Engine Diagnostic
fields.description: Full engine diagnostic scan to identify fault codes and performance issues. Covers all engine management sensors and systems.

fields.name: Gearbox Diagnostic
fields.description: Diagnostic scan of the gearbox and transmission system. Identifies fault codes and shifting issues.

fields.name: General Diagnostic Scan
fields.description: Full vehicle diagnostic scan covering all major systems and fault codes. Comprehensive report provided.

fields.name: Tyre Fitting
fields.description: Supply and fitting of a single tyre. Price per tyre and varies by tyre size and brand. We use quality branded tyres.

fields.name: Wheel Alignment
fields.description: Four-wheel alignment check and adjustment to manufacturer specifications. Helps prevent uneven tyre wear.

fields.name: Battery Replacement
fields.description: 12V battery replacement suited to your vehicle. Price varies by battery size and specification. Includes 3-year warranty on battery.

fields.name: Battery Health Check
fields.description: Test your battery condition, charge level, and alternator output. Quick and non-invasive check.

fields.name: Alternator Replacement
fields.description: Replacement of the alternator unit. Price varies by vehicle. Uses OEM-quality parts with 12-month warranty.

fields.name: Starter Motor Replacement
fields.description: Replacement of the starter motor. Price varies by vehicle. Uses OEM-quality parts with 12-month warranty.

fields.name: Clutch Kit Replacement
fields.description: Full clutch kit replacement including clutch plate, pressure plate, and release bearing. Price varies by vehicle. Includes 12-month warranty on parts and labour.

fields.name: Flywheel Replacement
fields.description: Dual mass flywheel replacement. Often recommended alongside clutch replacement. Price varies by vehicle.

fields.name: Exhaust Repair
fields.description: Repair of exhaust leaks, damaged sections, or loose fittings. Price varies depending on extent of repair required.

fields.name: Full Exhaust Replacement
fields.description: Complete exhaust system replacement from manifold to tailpipe. Price varies by vehicle. Uses OEM-quality components.

fields.name: DPF Clean
fields.description: Diesel particulate filter cleaning to restore performance and reduce emissions. Only applicable to diesel vehicles.

fields.name: Catalytic Converter Replacement
fields.description: Replacement of the catalytic converter to restore emissions performance. Price varies by vehicle. Includes 12-month warranty.

fields.name: Shock Absorbers Replacement
fields.description: Shock absorber replacement. Price per item. We recommend replacing in pairs (both sides of same axle). Includes 12-month warranty.

fields.name: Spring Replacement
fields.description: Coil spring replacement. Price per item. We recommend replacing in pairs. Includes 12-month warranty on parts and labour.

fields.name: Drop Links Replacement
fields.description: Anti-roll bar drop link replacement. Price per item. Reduces knocking and improves stability. Includes 12-month warranty.

fields.name: Air Conditioning Regas
fields.description: Air conditioning system regas and leak check to restore cooling performance. Includes UV dye for future leak detection.

fields.name: Coolant Flush
fields.description: Full coolant system flush and refill with fresh antifreeze to manufacturer specification.

fields.name: Radiator Flush
fields.description: Radiator flush to remove buildup and sediment. Helps prevent overheating and improves heating performance.

fields.name: EV Battery Health Check
fields.description: High voltage battery health check including cell condition and charge capacity analysis.

fields.name: Charging Port Inspection
fields.description: Inspection of the charging port, cable, and connection for wear or faults.

fields.name: Electric Motor Diagnostic
fields.description: Full diagnostic of the electric motor, inverter, and power electronics.

fields.name: EV Software Diagnostic
fields.description: Software and firmware diagnostic check for EV systems and error codes.

fields.name: EV / Hybrid Full Service
fields.description: Comprehensive EV or hybrid service including battery check, brake inspection, coolant check, and full vehicle diagnostic.
